name: Sync KubeSphere Images to ACR
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      version:
        default: "v4.1.2"

jobs:
  sync:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Login to ACR
        run: |
          echo "afoelkjUkjdla59d" | docker login registry.cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com \
            --username "aliyun8695051904" --password-stdin
      - name: Sync images
        run: |
          VERSION="v4.1.2"
          for img in ks-apiserver ks-console ks-controller-manager ks-upgrade; do
            docker pull kubesphere/${img}:${VERSION}
            docker tag kubesphere/${img}:${VERSION} registry.cn-beijing.

aliyuncs.com/kubesphere/${img}:${VERSION}
            docker push registry.cn-beijing.aliyuncs.com/kubesphere/${img}:${VERSION}
          done
